export class BulkAddFloorItemsParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;const count=wrapper.readInt();this._items=new Array(count);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const itemId=wrapper.readInt();const spriteId=wrapper.readInt();const x=wrapper.readInt();const y=wrapper.readInt();const rot=wrapper.readInt();const z=wrapper.readString();const heightOrEmpty=wrapper.readString();const extraInt=wrapper.readInt();const extraData=wrapper.readString();// <-- string by contract
const groupId=wrapper.readInt();const isUsable=wrapper.readInt();const userId=wrapper.readInt();const ownerName=wrapper.readString();this._items[i]={itemId,spriteId,x,y,rot,z,heightOrEmpty,extraInt,extraData,groupId,isUsable,userId,ownerName};}return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
